briefdescription.para: HMAC KAT key length in bytes.
HMAC KAT message length in bytes.
HMAC KAT SHA3-256 hash length in bytes.
This function validates the input HMAC parameters.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XAsu_HmacParams structure which holds the parameters of HMAC input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if HMAC input parameters validation is successful.
XST_FAILURE, if HMAC input parameters validation fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate SHA Mode and SHA Type.
Validate that exactly one of KeyInAddr or KeyId is provided.
When a direct key is provided, its length must be valid.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to compute the Message Authentication Code (MAC) for the given message using the specified hash function and the provided key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_HmacParams structure which holds the parameters of HMAC input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.
XASU_CLIENT_CTX_NOT_CREATED, if client context is not created.
XASU_REQUEST_INPROGRESS, if split request already in progress.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Validate required parameters for HMAC update operation.
Handle context operation.
Cleanup on FINAL operation.
Get the command ID based on SHA type.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to perform HMAC Known Answer Tests (KAT's).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_INVALID_UNIQUE_ID, if received Queue ID is invalid.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: Callback function for HMAC client-side KAT.

detaileddescription.para: Sets the notify flag and stores the completion status via per-invocation state.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the caller's XAsu_HmacKatCbState on stack.

briefdescription.para: This function runs the client-side HMAC KAT using SHA3-256.

para.verbatim: It calls XAsu_HmacCompute with INIT|UPDATE|FINAL, busy-waits for the callback, and compares the output against the expected HMAC.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if HMAC SHA3-256 KAT passes.
XST_FAILURE, if HMAC computation or comparison fails.

inbodydescription.para: Set up client parameters with KAT callback.
Set up HMAC parameters for single-shot operation.
Send HMAC compute request to the server.
Busy-wait for the server response.
Check the callback status.
Compare the computed HMAC against the expected value.
Zeroize local output buffer.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for Hash-Based Message Authentication Code(HMAC) module.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 yog 01/02/25 Initial release yog 07/10/25 Added support for priority based multiple request and context verification 1.1 kd 07/23/25 Fixed gcc warnings kp 02/26/26 Added client-side HMAC SHA3-256 KAT
